summary: v2.0.0-rc.5 (17 items: v1.x cleanup + narrow schema + consumption) + v2.0.0-rc.6 (6 items: active injection layer). Continuation of unpublished v2.0.0 RC chain.
approach: Wave-by-wave execution: rc.5 Wave 1-4 → tag v2.0.0-rc.5 → rc.6 → tag v2.0.0-rc.6. Each release gated by its coverage-gate script + dogfood cycle.

design_decisions.decision: Continue v2.0.0 RC chain (rc.5..N → v2.0.0 stable) rather than v2.0.1 patch line
design_decisions.rationale: v2.0.0 commit f351ffb/9356cd3 tagged locally but never published; clean-slate preference makes rc.5 cheaper than v2.0.1 patch
design_decisions.tradeoff: Loses git-tag-as-marketing signal until rc chain stabilizes

design_decisions.decision: Wave-based ordering enforced via depends_on (Wave 1 → 2 → 3 → 4 → rc.6)
design_decisions.rationale: File renames (A1) cascade into all subsequent work; schema additions (C1) gate boundary work (B1/C2/C3/C4); coverage gate gates rc.6
design_decisions.tradeoff: Reduces parallelism; only Wave 1 fully parallel

design_decisions.decision: Single signal source (edit_paths only) for relevance_paths generation in rc.5
design_decisions.rationale: rc.5 simplicity; multi-signal (read_paths + body regex + symbols) deferred to rc.7+ if recall insufficient
design_decisions.tradeoff: Risk of low recall for narrow scope; lint #23 narrow_no_paths surfaces issue early

design_decisions.decision: Hook silence (>95% silence rate) is feature not bug; triggers fabric-import recommendation
design_decisions.rationale: Silence signals KB narrow-ratio degradation; reinforces self-healing telemetry loop
design_decisions.tradeoff: Requires E6 telemetry infrastructure; small added complexity

design_decisions.decision: rc.5 Signal A = pure 24h time-only; rc.6 upgrades to 24h-OR-20-edits via PreToolUse sidecar
design_decisions.rationale: Plan_context count unreliable post-hooks (auto-fire inflates); edit-count sidecar materializes only in rc.6 via E4
design_decisions.tradeoff: rc.5 Signal A may fire less often; rc.6 restores fidelity

design_decisions.decision: revision_hash excludes pending (C7) — gates rc.6 cache correctness
design_decisions.rationale: Pending adds shouldn't thrash session-hints cache (E3); approval to canonical does
design_decisions.tradeoff: Pending entries still tracked in meta.json nodes (for enumeration), just excluded from hash

design_decisions.decision: narrow team → personal flip auto-degrades scope to broad (clear relevance_paths)
design_decisions.rationale: Personal knowledge crosses projects — paths don't generalize; explicit auto-degrade + event preserves audit trail
design_decisions.tradeoff: User loses original narrow paths after flip; mitigated by event log

design_decisions.decision: fabric-import writes broad + [] for all imports (LLM-driven, no path inference)
design_decisions.rationale: Per Q-1 resolution: LLM cannot accurately bind paths from git history; default broad is safer; narrow refinement deferred to user review
design_decisions.tradeoff: Initial import lacks narrow precision; mitigated by lint #23 warnings and fab_review.modify workflow

design_decisions.decision: CLI plan-context-hint outputs versioned JSON to stdout; hooks render stderr
design_decisions.rationale: Decoupled evolution — engine schema can evolve without hook renderer changes; hooks render in harness-native style
design_decisions.tradeoff: Adds CLI process startup overhead (~100ms per invocation); acceptable for SessionStart/PreToolUse cadence

data_flow.diagram: Wave 1 [A2|A4|C7|D1] (parallel, no behavior change) → Wave 2 [A1 rename → C1 schema → A3 refactor] (sequential) → Wave 3 [B1 → B2 / B3+B4 / C2 / C3 → C4 / C5 / C6 / fabric-import] (fan-out from schema+rename) → Wave 4 [D2 README → rc.5 coverage gate + dogfood] → tag v2.0.0-rc.5 → rc.6 [E1 → E2+E4 → E3 → E5 → E6 → rc.6 coverage gate + dogfood] → tag v2.0.0-rc.6 → v2.0.0 stable

stages.output: Cleaned tree without intent-ledger / dashboard / Cocos refs; computeRevision excludes pending; CLI plan-context-hint registered
MCP tool renamed; server name renamed; agents.meta + plan_context output schemas cleaned; relevance_scope + relevance_paths fields parseable; plan-context degenerate mode at ≤30

Dual pending root; pending auto-archive; archive Skill viability gate + scope decision; plan_context relevance_paths filter; review.modify canonical + layer-flip auto-degrade; lints #22-#25; consumption tracking event + orphan_demote pivot; Signal A 24h-only; fabric-import broad default; fabric-hint renamed + Signal C + 3-client hook configs
README rewritten with 8 真特色 + 4 deliberately-not-done; rc.5-coverage-gate.mjs green; dogfood cycle passed; v2.0.0-rc.5 tagged

SessionStart broad-hint hook; PreToolUse narrow-hint hook + edit-counter sidecar; session-hints cache; fabric-hint Signal A 24h-OR-20-edits upgrade; lint #26 + silence telemetry; rc6-coverage-gate.mjs green; dogfood passes; v2.0.0-rc.6 tagged

dependencies: Existing rc.4 coverage gate script as pattern reference
Existing rule-* server module surface (renamed in TASK-005)
Claude Code / Cursor / Codex CLI hook event payload contracts

quality_check.executor: self-validated (CLI quality check skipped — agent self-checked against scope.md acceptance criteria + handoff.json scope items)

dimensions.completeness: All 17 rc.5 items (A1-A4, B1-B4, C1-C7, D1-D2) + 6 rc.6 items (E1-E6) covered across 22 implementation tasks + 2 coverage-gate tasks
dimensions.granularity: Tasks sized 15-90 min each; D2 README and A1 rename are large but cohesive units
dimensions.dependencies: Wave ordering enforced; no cycles; Wave-1 parallel; rc.6 strictly after rc.5 via TASK-018→TASK-019 link
dimensions.convergence_criteria: All criteria quoted verbatim from handoff.json#acceptance_criteria, quantified and testable
dimensions.constraint_compliance: No specs/*.md files in repo to violate; cross-checked against scope.md §4 boundary lines

quality_check.notes: ccw spec load --category planning returned no specs (no project-tech specs directory exists); plan validated against handoff.json + scope.md as authoritative source instead.
